title: 皐月賞の後に・はしりてー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan wasn't able to take first place.
However, a new spark is kindled in her heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's experienced the allure of racing on
a big stage, it's captured her heart. However, her
toenails are in terrible shape.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Jordan expresses her desire to keep running. We
consult a doctor and begin working hard to help
her nails recover.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back at school, she's greeted by an article
praising her perseverance despite the odds and a
group of students inspired by said article.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though embarrassed to be held up as an
inspiration, she's looking forward to healing up by
fall for the G2 Copa Republica Argentina.
